hero.title: Company Profile
hero.lead: Cosun Global Electronic Manufacturing (COSUN) was built for global B2B buyers who want less drama and more predictable outcomes.
paragraphs: Since 2010, we've grown by solving the problems procurement teams remember most: inconsistent batches, unclear specs, slow replies, and shipments that don't match the approved sample.
Today, COSUN supports wholesalers, brand owners, retailers, and importers across North America and Europe with a simple promise: stable quality, factory-direct efficiency, and clear communication.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To power the driving experience with practical in-vehicle accessories - built to survive real use, not just pass a photo test.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a long-term manufacturing partner for automotive accessory brands worldwide - helping customers launch faster, reduce returns, and scale repeat orders.

products.title: What We Make
products.description: We focus on high-velocity automotive accessories that solve everyday needs and perform consistently in real car environments:
items: Car cigarette lighter sockets (12V/24V replacement and panel-mount)
USB car chargers (USB-A/USB-C; PD/QC options by project)
Magnetic phone mounts and car holders
Temporary parking number plates
Car cup holders and ashtrays
In-vehicle power adapters and splitters

items.title: Wholesalers & Importers
items.description: Stable replenishment and fewer receiving surprises.

items.title: Brand Owners
items.description: Private-label lines with differentiation customers can feel.

items.title: Retailers
items.description: Shelf presentation, packaging clarity, and defect control.

items.title: E-commerce Sellers
items.description: Fighting return rates, reviews, and listing compliance.

cards.title: Factory Advantages
items: 10 structured production lines or work cells for scale-ready workflow
Standardized work instructions and checkpoints reduce variation
Functional testing aligned to common failure causes
Revision control so approved stays approved

cards.title: Company Advantages
items: Clear RFQ inputs for faster, accurate quotes
Faster decisions with engineering and production aligned
Photo or video confirmations during pilot runs
Export-ready communication that respects your timeline

cards.title: Pricing Advantage
items: Factory-direct efficiency with clear cost structure
Value engineering tiers to hit target price
Stable repeat orders reduce rework and claims

compliance.title: Quality and Compliance Mindset
compliance.description: Compliance planning protects your listings, reduces customs delays, and strengthens buyer confidence. We align documentation and labeling based on your product configuration and destination market.
items: EU Declaration of Conformity and CE readiness
RoHS substance restrictions for electronics
FCC equipment authorization pathways
ISO 9001 aligned QMS documentation if required

howWeWork.title: How We Work
steps: Confirm market requirements, channel expectations, and reliability specs.
Prototype quickly to validate fit, finish, and user experience.
Lock spec, packaging, and labeling before mass production.
Run production with checkpoints and documented revisions.
Support export packing and repeat-order stability as you scale.

primary.title: Start an RFQ
primary.description: Share target market, quantity, and customization needs. We respond within 24 hours with a practical quote and clear next steps.

secondary.title: Request Samples
secondary.description: Validate fit, finish, and performance before you scale. Stock samples or branded samples are both available.
